sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f strategy allocating 20% of initial active equity per trade. Produces daily geometric mean of 1.01933 for efficient compounding. Position size derived from TWR formula: (1.01933)^(ln(Goal)/ln(1.01933)) with 0.2 active equity fraction.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f strategy with 20% of initial active equity as position sizing, which produces a daily geometric mean of 1.01933 and compounds account growth more efficiently than static fractional f approaches.
